com.hp.workpath.api.access

Class AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    AuthenticationAttributes

    public static class AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder
extends AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder>
    The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Other type to request sign in.
    Since:
    API 2
